Made by @Blakspectre_64

Do the left wall - oversplit like its nothing, a very impressive feat!

This Emote is given away in the 📀ord Server :
.gg/eeDTa8mSUT
There will be more Giveaways in the near future!


This Emote Includes Facial Animations
& was made for the:
[3.0] "Woman Bundle" (https://www.roblox.com/bundles/239/Woman)
Please make sure to use that,
unless you have another bundle that works!

I tried my best to keep the anatomy as
accurate and realistic as possible!

Please use appropriately,
as this is a roleplay & proper use emote!
Inappropriate use might result in
your account being at risk.
Thanks, for understanding.

Favorite this emote and join the group 
for more Idle emotes like this! - It really helps

items.name: Elton John - Hollywood Star Suit
items.description:
Feel like a star in this flashy suit made by UGC Creator @Lovespun in homage to the outfit Elton John wore when he received his star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame. 

The suit comes with an Elton John Avatar Bundle and the look is completed with a pair of star-shaped glasses by @Blizzei and a star-studded pair of designer shoes. 

All items can be removed from the Avatar body so that you can mix and match to create a style all your own.
